{{Infobox group
| name = Ach’magut’s Inquisitors
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Inquisitors]] are the spider-like minions of the [[Great Elder]] known as Ach’magut, also called the [[Overseer]]. These creatures possess ten legs and numerous eyes situated on flexible stalks. While they are typically known for observing from a distance, they have been observed engaging in uncharacteristic, bold behavior, such as abducting vulnerable individuals for rituals intended to summon the [[void]]. They are capable of swarming in large numbers and have been known to attack by pulling targets apart. The [[Inquisitors]] generally only act in unison when following the direct commands of Ach’magut, a leader who was believed to be dead but whose potential revival may signal the execution of a plan established over two millennia ago.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Ach’magut’s Inquisitors]] depopulate cities they take.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Inquisitors]] are the spawn of Ach’magut and appear as ten-legged spiders with innumerable eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Inquisitors]] previously haunted [[Silverreach]] four years before.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Ach’magut has an army of [[Inquisitors]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Ach’magut’s Inquisitors]] are capable of dissecting people.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
